Off Calendar Jan-05-2026 Continued To Mar-23-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The matter was called for hearing on (1) Status on Filing the First Account; and (2) Order to Show Cause Why Suspended Trustee Should Not Be Removed.

No appearances were made. The Court continued all matters to March 23, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court indicated that it may request a Court Investigator to verify the trustee's address. The Court stated that a further Order to Appear will be issued for notice of the continued hearing.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court suspends Mia McClure as Trustee, in open court. An Order to Appear will be issued to in propria persona Trustee Mia McClure to appear on Jan-05-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the first accounting has not been filed. An Order to Show Cause as to why the court should not remove Mia McClure as Trustee is set for the same date. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Robles. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Nov-20-2024 Continued To Dec-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Verleana Green, Esq., for Talia Moore, Administrator of related Estate.

At the outset, there are some technical difficulties with counsel's audio therefore, counsel addresses the court's queries via Zoom's chat feature. Counsel confirms having the executed Inventory and Appraisal and that it will be filed soon.

At the conclusion of the exchange via Zoom's chat feature, the subject matter is continued to Dec-23-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of The Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: Estate of Alzina Marie Ray and
PTR-24-307159 The Marcus McClure 2024 Special Needs Trust.

Appearances: Verleana Green appeared by zoom for and with Talia Moore by zoom.
James Michel appeared by zoom for John Sykes (creditor).

The court noted that Mrs. Green filed a notice document recently. Mr. Michel stated that he has an issue with respect to his client, that he understands that property taxes were paid, but he also understands that there is an application for a refund with respect to the parent child transfer exclusion and asked if the matter can remain under court supervision. Mrs. Green stated that the three-year time period to file for the parent child transfer exclusion has passed, that they are still working with the assessor's office to see if they will accept the application, that they paid $112,000.00 and that she does not know how long it will take. Status on filing of trustee's bond is off calendar. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission. Status of the property tax refund application is set for February 26, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Green is to file something two weeks prior.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of The Trustee'S Bond
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Continued To Aug-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: Estate of Alzina Marie Ray and
PTR-24-307159 The Marcus McClure 2024 Special Needs Trust.

Appearances: Verleana Green appeared by zoom for and with Talia Moore by zoom.
James Michel appeared by zoom for John Sykes (creditor).

Mrs. Green stated that she received additional information with respect to Mr. Ray's share, that a levy is being executed so that the funds that are going to Mr. Ray go back to the creditor with an exemption amount of $33,000.00, that a lien was executed on her client and that her client was served. Mrs. Green also stated that she has to amend the accounting petition, that supplemental taxes were levied and that the bond amount will need to be changed. Mr. Michel stated that the money has to go to the Contra Costa County Sheriff. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc., and status on filing of trustee's bond are continued to August 14, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belem. Not reported.

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Verleana Green appeared by zoom for and with Talia Moore by zoom.
Endy Ukoha-Ajike (proposed guardian ad litem) appeared by zoom in propria persona.
Mia McClure (proposed trustee) appeared by zoom in propria persona.
Marcus McClure appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Marcus McClure did not respond to any of the court's questions. The court determined that Marcus McClure does not have legal capacity and that there is no need to appoint a guardian ad litem. The Petition for Substituted Judgment is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
